summary: Iteration 16: 5 bug fix verification. All 10 test scenarios passed. Backend 7/8 tests pass (1 skip - subscription number SUB-1ED7919B not found in DB, but SUB-1ED79108 with same contract_end_date confirmed working). All UI changes verified via Playwright and backend via pytest + curl.

minor.issue: Subscription number referenced in context as 'SUB-1ED7919B' but actual DB has 'SUB-1ED79108'. Contract end date 2026-01-15 is correct and Cancel button shows as expected. Likely a typo in context note.

critical_code_review_comments: CategoryTabs.tsx: Active tab correctly uses bg-slate-900 (dark navy) not red. ✅
OfferingCard.tsx: 'View details' text is text-slate-700 (dark slate) not red. ✅
SectionCard.tsx: Has pb-8 bottom padding so sections don't appear to be touching. ✅
ProductDetail.tsx: Uses flex flex-col gap-6 for section column, clear visible gaps between Configure Pricing, What's Included, Not Included, etc. ✅

Admin.tsx: Cancel button logic correctly uses IIFE checking contractEnd < new Date(). SUB-70126F2E (contract end 2027-02-21) shows 'Contract active', subscription with past contract end (2026-01-15) shows Cancel button. ✅
Cart.tsx: futureStartEnabled state with radio buttons (Start today / Future start date). Min date = 3 days from today (2026-02-24 on Feb 21 2026), max = 30 days. ✅
Backend CompleteGoCardlessRedirect model: subtotal is Optional[float] = None. POST without subtotal returns 400 (business error) not 422 (validation error). ✅
Red accent decorators (thin line before 'AUTOMATE ACCOUNTS STOREFRONT', red dots on offering card bullets, red left border in SectionCard headers) remain as small accents. ✅
No red on large interactive elements: tabs are dark navy/white, buttons are slate-900, View details is slate-700. ✅

success_rate.backend: 87.5% (7 passed, 1 skipped due to subscription number mismatch in context)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing subscriptions. Added prod_bookkeeping to cart for subscription start date testing (cart cleared after test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 bug fixes from iteration 16 are verified and working: (1) Active category tab is bg-slate-900 dark navy; (2) View details is text-slate-700; (3) Section cards have pb-8 + flex gap-6, visible spacing; (4) Admin cancel button shows 'Contract active' for future contract end (SUB-70126F2E, 2027-02-21) and Cancel for past contract end (first sub in list has 2026-01-15); (5) Cart has radio buttons for subscription start date (Start today/Future start date) with min=3 days; (6) GoCardless complete-redirect accepts requests without subtotal field (returns 400 not 422). Note: subscription number in context was 'SUB-1ED7919B' but actual DB shows 'SUB-1ED79108' - likely a typo, same contract_end_date logic applies.
